results.compiled_code:
with customers as (

    select
        id as customer_id,
        first_name,
        last_name

    from `dbt-tutorial`.jaffle_shop.customers

),

orders as (

    select
        id as order_id,
        user_id as customer_id,
        order_date,
        status

    from `dbt-tutorial`.jaffle_shop.orders

),

customer_orders as (

    select
        customer_id,

        min(order_date) as first_order_date,
        max(order_date) as most_recent_order_date,
        count(order_id) as number_of_orders

    from orders

    group by 1

),

final as (

    select
        customers.customer_id,
        customers.first_name,
        customers.last_name,
        customer_orders.first_order_date,
        customer_orders.most_recent_order_date,
        coalesce(customer_orders.number_of_orders, 0) as number_of_orders

    from customers

    left join customer_orders using (customer_id)

)

select * from final

select
    id as order_id,
    user_id as customer_id,
    order_date,
    status

from `dbt-tutorial`.jaffle_shop.orders

    select

),

customer_orders as (

final as (

)

select * from final

with dbt_test__target as (

  select customer_id as unique_field
  from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`customers`
  where customer_id is not null

)

select
    unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from dbt_test__target
group by unique_field
having count(*) > 1

select customer_id
from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`customers`
where customer_id is null

with all_values as (

    select
        status as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_orders`
    group by status

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'placed','shipped','completed','return_pending','returned'
)

select customer_id
from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_orders`
where customer_id is null

select order_id
from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_orders`
where order_id is null

with dbt_test__target as (

  select order_id as unique_field
  from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_orders`
  where order_id is not null

)

select
    unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from dbt_test__target
group by unique_field
having count(*) > 1

with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_orders`
    where customer_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select customer_id as to_field
    from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_customers`
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select customer_id
from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_customers`
where customer_id is null

with dbt_test__target as (

  select customer_id as unique_field
  from `organic-bivouac-458413-s3`.`jaffle_shop`.`stg_customers`
  where customer_id is not null

)

select
    unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from dbt_test__target
group by unique_field
having count(*) > 1
